TITAN PROPERTY AWARDS The TITAN Property Awards program recognizes, celebrates, and honors the highest levels of achievement in property development, interior design, architecture, landscape design, lighting design, conceptual design, product design, and marketing, focusing on ergonomics, innovativeness, living standards, originality, and sustainability. This award is open to property developers, interior designers, architects, real estate professionals, advertisers, landscape designers, lighting designers, marketers, and individual service providers, from residential to commercial and local to international, who aim to improve our daily lives, implement sustainability, and preserve the environment. Enter TITAN Property Awards AWARD CATEGORIES Recognizing developmental excellence within the property industry, encompassing: Property Development, Interior Design, Architecture, Landscape Design, Lighting Design, Conceptual Design, Product Design, Real Estate, and Marketing at large. TITAN Awards is open to all property developers, interior designers, architects, real estate professionals, advertisers, landscape designers, lighting designers, marketers, and individual service providers, from residential to commercial and local to international. Showcase your innovative excellence and capture the attention of our esteemed panel of judges today! United States Artem Kropovinsky Founder and Principal Designer, Arsight Artem Kropovinsky, Founder of the New York–based design studio Arsight, is an accomplished interior designer with over a decade of experience leading transformative residential and commercial projects. Recognition of Artem's prowess was unmistakably evident when he emerged as a finalist in a renowned international program. This acknowledgment underlines both his innovative spirit and his profound respect for cultural heritage in design. Always on the cutting edge, Artem champions the integration of the Metaverse, Virtual Reality (VR), and Augmented Reality (AR) in his projects. Such pioneering efforts have redefined client experiences, particularly for partners like Societhy. Artem’s collaborations span from furniture makers like Design Galleria Kitchen and Bath Studio to tech innovators such as Virtual Staging Solutions, reflecting his holistic design approach. Known for blending history with modern aesthetics, his work on projects like the Weyanoke Hotel and Catbird Restaurants showcases his ability to create timeless spaces. Netherlands Misak Terzibasiyan Founder and Principal Architect, UArchitects Misak Terzibasiyan is the founder and principal architect of UArchitects (Urban Design and Architects). UArchitects is a global firm that embraces a diverse team of various nationalities. The founder, having studied at the Eindhoven University of Technology in The Netherlands, gained experience with several international architectural firms prior to establishing the company in the culturally and architecturally renowned city of Eindhoven. Terzibasiyan's professional and personal pursuits are deeply rooted in a global perspective and the exploration of cultural motifs, a focus influenced by his own ethnic heritage, having been born in Helsinki. He has established himself as an esteemed individual in his domain, with a career marked by an international outlook and a dedication to incorporating cultural diversity into his work. His recognition in the field is a testament to his commitment to embracing and understanding the interplay of different cultures in his professional endeavors. Portugal Tiago do Vale Senior Architect, Tiago do Vale Arquitectos Tiago do Vale has contributed his remarkable skills as the senior architect at Tiago do Vale Arquitectos for a span of 15 years. His extensive experience and creative vision contribute to the development of innovative design solutions that address clients' unique needs and aspirations. He plays a pivotal role in mentoring and guiding junior architects, fostering their professional growth and ensuring the successful execution of projects. He was a Senator and Member of the University of Coimbra's Assembly and served as the contributing editor for the book "Urban Complex" published by Design Media Publishing, and its Chinese counterpart, "城市综合体," by Liaoning Science and Technology Publishing House. Do Vale’s published works have gained international recognition, and he has delivered lectures and authored articles on topics spanning architecture, urban planning, and rehabilitation in various locations. View TITAN Property Jury Panel If you’d like to be a part of our distinguished jury members, or be considered for future inclusions in the TITAN Awards program, do consider nominating yourself, and we’ll get back to you soon. Nominate A Juror --> TITAN Statuette Symbol of Excellence Based on the legendary Mo'ai statues, the TITAN Awards statuette radiates strength and sturdiness. As like those who thrive within the property industry, the multi-faceted structures depict the wide assortment of achievements within property that persevered through adversities and hardships. The 13” statuette positioned on top of a solid zinc-alloy base signifies businesses with a strong foundation, built through blood, sweat, and tears. Be it a matte black or full gold finish, the figure stands to remind you that with hard work and persistence, you too can be a TITAN in your industry. Enter TITAN Property Awards TITAN TESTIMONIALS Read, and be Inspired by, Our Winners’ Success Stories. “ Winning this award is a tremendous honor for me, my team, and our entire organization. This recognition reflects our commitment to excellence, innovation, and unparalleled craftsmanship in real estate and interior design. ” ~ Jonathan Eav, Executive Director of The Eav’s Group “ Winning in this award holds profound meaning for our team and organization. Design, for us, is a collaborative effort, and this recognition underscores the hard work and dedication of every team member involved. ” ~ Anita Srisakulchawla, Founder and Executive Manager of ASC Interior “ First and foremost, thank you – we are honored to receive this award. It underscores the value of our creative approach to storytelling in the real estate sector. It also demonstrates that our bold ideas and innovative solutions can deliver meaningful results for our clients. ” ~ Koss Turbin, Daniel Nagaets & Oleh Bushanskyi of Fortes.Vision “ This recognition reinforces the impact of what’s happening in Boulder and across our portfolio in the US and UK. This award validates the hard work of our teams, our partners, and the innovators. ” ~ Jennifer Chavez, Director of BioMed Realty “ This award reinforced that the hard work invested in designing lighting purpose-built for sustainability and mission-critical environments truly resonated. It was also validating to see that the industry recognizes the importance of lighting as a lever for meaningful energy and operational improvements. ” ~ LANTANA LED Team “ Winning the TITAN Property Awards is not only an honor but also a reminder to remain curious and passionate, allowing design to become a universal language that connects us to the world. This award signifies more than mere recognition; it serves as a reminder to uphold creativity, professionalism, and purpose in my endeavors. ” ~ Lin Chia-Yu, Founder and CEO of ININHOME Co., Ltd.
